title: TURF: curve family across anchors
summary: Run anchored ladders for sizes 1-4 in parallel and combine into a curve family.
oce_text:
[["maxdiff-turf::curve-family"]]
utilities = "./utilities.csv"
out_dir = "./runs/curve-family"
anchor_ks = [1, 2, 3, 4]
reach_method = "first-choice"
search_method = "auto"
ladder_mode = "repair"
parallel_jobs = 4
non_utility_cols = "1,2"

title: TURF: curve family (all anchors)
summary: Sweep all feasible anchor sizes with weighted reach and four parallel jobs.
oce_text:
[["maxdiff-turf::curve-family"]]
utilities = "./utilities.csv"
out_dir = "./runs/curve-family-all"
reach_method = "weighted-by-probability"
search_method = "auto"
ladder_mode = "repair"
parallel_jobs = 4
non_utility_cols = "1,2"
